analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet congratulates the launch of the China-Africa Environmental Cooperation Center, stating China’s commitment to FOCAC green development and welcoming African initiatives on climate and environmental protection. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—emphasizes cooperation with Africa, commitment to green development, multilateral engagement, and welcoming African initiatives, portraying China as supportive and mutually beneficial. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not discussed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic governance. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claims about domestic achievements or leadership superiority; just commitment statements. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
